name: Crawfish-Tasso Saute
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Tasso, chopped or other smoked sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over high heat in a sauté pan.
2. Add onion, bell pepper, celery, mushroom, salt, Tabasco, Tasso (or other smoked sausage), garlic, crawfish tails, shrimp stock, white wine, green onion, and parsley to the pan.
3. Cook until everything is clear and lightly browned.
4. Add more of the chopped Tasso or additional smoked sausage if desired.
5. Continue cooking until the liquid is almost reduced and the crawfish are heated through.
6. Remove from heat and let sit for a moment before serving.
7. Serve over seasoned rice or buttered pasta.
Yield: 1 serving (wrv)
